name: Noodle-Seafood Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Green cabbage, cored and coarsely shredded (4 cups)
2 packages (3 oz.) Chicken or Shrimp Flavor Oriental soup with seasoning packets
8 oz Flaked imitation crabmeat (thawed if frozen)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place water, cabbage, carrot, and contents of seasoning packets in a 3-quart pot.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over high heat.
3. Once boiling, reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Break noodles in half and add them to the pot along with crabmeat and scallions.
5. Simmer for an additional 2 to 3 minutes until noodles are tender.
6. Remove from heat and stir in sesame oil.
7. Serve with a crisp cucumber salad on the side.
8. Offer soy sauce at the table for individual use.
